title: CRP Registry Config v1
description: Configuration document served by a CRP Registry at /v1/index/config.json. Declares the registry's capabilities and layer URLs.

registryVersion.description: Registry protocol version. Must be "1" for this version.

api.description: Base URL for the API layer (write operations + search).

download.description: Base URL for the download layer (content retrieval by hash).

index.description: Base URL for the index layer (discovery). If omitted, defaults to the URL from which config.json was fetched.

authRequired.description: If true, all operations (including reads) require authentication.

authUrl.description: Base URL for OAuth endpoints (device, token). Required if the registry supports authentication.
